name: Quick Laser
effect_text: Hot Deploy. Deal 4 damage; enters ready to attack this turn.
flavor_text: Out of the rack, into the muzzle, into the enemy, all on the same breath.

name: Twin Pistol
effect_text: Alpha Strike. Deal 2 damage twice to target.
flavor_text: Left hand shoots first. Right hand shoots better. Both hands shoot finished.

name: Recon Gun
effect_text: Recon Beacon. Deal 3 damage; heal your ship 2 when this attacks.
flavor_text: Fires and then tells you what you just saw. Usually useful. Sometimes too late.

name: Ice Beam
effect_text: Disable. Deal 3 damage; target cannot activate abilities next turn.
flavor_text: Cold enough to seize the control cables. Nothing moves. Nothing argues.

name: Stealth Laser
effect_text: Cloaked Entry. Deal 3 damage; cannot be attacked the turn deployed.
flavor_text: Arrives as shadow. Fires as sound. Leaves, eventually, as myth.

name: Burst Cannon
effect_text: Alpha Strike. Deal 3 damage twice to target.
flavor_text: Pulls the trigger once. The mechanism pulls the trigger again, more thoroughly.

name: Plasma Sniper
effect_text: Priority Fire. Critical Strike. Deal 6 damage.
flavor_text: One shot lands before the other gun arrives. The other gun is not needed anymore.

name: Dual Pulse
effect_text: Priority Fire. Overclock. Deal 5 damage.
flavor_text: Two coils. One trigger. The second coil finishes what the first could not.

name: Phase Laser
effect_text: Phase Drive. Quick Strike. Deal 5 damage.
flavor_text: Enters from a dimension where the enemy already lost. Delivers the same outcome here.

name: Plasma Burst
effect_text: Hot Deploy. Breach Cascade. Deal 6 damage; adjacent units take 2.
flavor_text: Lights up the whole section of sky. Everybody nearby takes notes or damage.

name: Salvo Launcher
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Flanking Fire. Deal 5 damage.
flavor_text: Launches a brace of small problems. The enemy sorts them out one at a time.

name: Ion Sniper
effect_text: Tracking Lock. Deal 6 damage and apply Tracking Lock to target.
flavor_text: Marks the target. Fires at the mark. Collects the mark for the next shot.

name: Ghost Round
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Cloaked Entry. Deal 5 damage.
flavor_text: Leaves no muzzle flash. Leaves a small crater. Leaves a reputation unattached to a name.

name: Heavy Burst
effect_text: Alpha Strike. Deal 4 damage twice to target.
flavor_text: Larger coil, same rhythm. The enemy still gets the same verdict, twice.

name: Master Sniper
effect_text: Tracking Lock. Critical Strike. Deal 8 damage.
flavor_text: Points at a face. The face takes a long time to recover. Usually permanently.

name: Phantom Beam
effect_text: Phase Drive. Gain Stealth. Deal 7 damage.
flavor_text: Nobody sees it. Nobody hears it. The hull finds out, once, in silence.

name: Warhead Salvo
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Priority Fire. Deal 9 damage.
flavor_text: All racks empty. All racks warmed. All racks reloaded by different hands elsewhere.

name: Chain Lance
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Chain Catalyst. Deal 7; adjacent take 2; next non-unit card +2 damage.
flavor_text: The arc hunts the crowd. Each hop is politely measured. Each hop lands.

name: Fusion Torpedo
effect_text: Cold Boot 1. Overflow Fire. Deal 9 damage; excess hits ship directly.
flavor_text: Arms slowly. Detonates completely. The arithmetic makes the slow part worth it.

name: Tactical Cannon
effect_text: Manual Fire. Priority Fire. Once per turn, pay 1 to deal 8 damage.
flavor_text: Reloads on a schedule. The schedule is the pilot. The schedule is picky.

name: Siege Rifle
effect_text: Tracking Lock. Apply Lock. Deal 8 damage; target skips next refresh.
flavor_text: Patient weapon. Patient pilot. Patient enemy, at least until the fourth second.

name: Cascade Gun
effect_text: Cascading Power. Deal 8 damage, +1 per non-unit card played this turn.
flavor_text: Waits for the other cards to speak first. Delivers the compiled summary.

name: Cluster Bomb
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Apply Lock. Deal 7; adjacent take 2; target skips next refresh.
flavor_text: Not one problem. Several small, related problems, delivered at the same address.

name: Heavy Lance (Field Model)
effect_text: Priority Fire. Flanking Fire. Deal 12 damage.
flavor_text: Field model. Shipped without ceremony. Arrives with consequences anyway.

name: Assault Cannon
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Hot Activation. Deal 11 damage; may use Manual Fire the turn deployed.
flavor_text: Comes with the pilot's name on the grip. The target's name comes later.

name: Void Sniper
effect_text: Critical Strike. Phase Drive. Deal 10 damage; bypasses most blockers.
flavor_text: A round that has already decided on its conclusion. The target is only a witness.

name: Dual Barrel
effect_text: Alpha Strike. Priority Fire. Deal 6 damage twice.
flavor_text: Both barrels fire first. Everything else in the fight files a complaint.

name: Rift Torpedo
effect_text: Overflow Fire. Radiation Leak. Deal 12; excess to ship; apply 3 over 3 turns.
flavor_text: Opens a small tear in space. Closes it on the enemy, slowly, patiently, completely.

name: Sabotage Cannon
effect_text: Sabotage Charge. Disable. Deal 11; plant a charge that triggers when target uses ability.
flavor_text: Small switch sits inside the enemy ship. Waits. Waits. Thinks about it once. Acts.

name: Phantom Torpedo
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Rapid Launch. Deal 10 damage; enters unseen.
flavor_text: Launches on no sensor. Lands on every one. Writes itself a short obituary after.

name: Kinetic Storm
effect_text: Alpha Strike. Deal 6 damage twice to target.
flavor_text: Every round finds the next round funny. The enemy does not share the joke.

name: Scorch Cannon
effect_text: Radiation Leak. Breach Cascade. Deal 11; adjacent take 2; 3 radiation over 3 turns.
flavor_text: Leaves a trail of consequences. The consequences never agree on whose fault it was.

name: Pulse Cannon (Overclocked)
effect_text: Overclock. Deal 13 damage; adds 1 heat.
flavor_text: The coil runs past the gauge. The gauge decides it was mistaken about the maximum.

name: Master Cannon
effect_text: Priority Fire. Critical Strike. Deal 15 damage.
flavor_text: The weapon the fleet gives to pilots they want to keep. The pilots keep winning.

name: Siege Rocket
effect_text: Overflow Fire. Radiation Leak. Deal 16; excess to ship; 3 radiation over 3 turns.
flavor_text: The siege goes home to brag. The target does not go home.

name: Ghost Lance
effect_text: Phase Drive. Gain Stealth. Critical Strike. Deal 14 damage.
flavor_text: Nobody sees it coming. Nobody sees it leave. Only the enemy writes up the difference.

name: Cluster Strike
effect_text: Priority Fire. Breach Cascade. Alpha Strike. Deal 13; adjacent take 3; fires twice.
flavor_text: First volley speaks. Second volley agrees with the first. The neighborhood agrees quietly.

name: Ionic Bomber
effect_text: Critical Strike. Radiation Leak. Deal 14; 2 radiation over 3 turns.
flavor_text: A slow-burning weapon. Damage arrives on a schedule the target refuses to read.

name: Heavy Orbital
effect_text: Priority Fire. Rapid Launch. Deal 18 damage.
flavor_text: Spoken from high up. The answer is not written anywhere but the crater.

name: Void Annihilator
effect_text: Critical Strike. Phase Drive. Deal 18 damage.
flavor_text: A gun not meant for polite use. The tribunal has never even heard of it.

name: Raptor Drone
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Priority Fire. Enters ready to attack.
flavor_text: Predator-cut chassis. Predator-cut pilot. Predator-cut conclusion on every mission brief.

name: Stalker Drone
effect_text: Cloaked Entry. Gain Stealth.
flavor_text: Hangs behind the signal, reads the signal, answers the signal on its own preferred day.

name: Medic Unit
effect_text: Auto-Repair 1. Hull Drain. Damage dealt heals your ship for that amount.
flavor_text: Bites the enemy. Carries the enemy's blood home. Keeps the ship alive afterwards.

name: Saboteur Drone
effect_text: Deploy Burst: Disable target enemy unit's abilities next turn.
flavor_text: Arrives with a small screwdriver. Leaves with most of the enemy's ideas.

name: Hunter Drone
effect_text: Critical Strike. Any damage destroys target Drone or Weapon.
flavor_text: Short legs. Short patience. Short funeral service for whatever it locked onto.

name: Scout Elite
effect_text: Deploy Burst: Probe 1 and Recon Beacon 2.
flavor_text: Rated for three things: watch, report, survive. Excels at the first two most days.

name: Falcon Strike
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Alpha Strike. Enters ready; attack triggers twice.
flavor_text: One dive. Two hits. One pilot. Two stories the enemy will never tell.

name: Ghost Raider
effect_text: Phase Drive. Cloaked Entry.
flavor_text: Not on the radar. Not on the roster. Still collecting hazard pay somewhere.

name: Veteran Fighter
effect_text: Battle Hardened. Outrider. Grows stronger from damage and first attack is free.
flavor_text: Older than the squadron. Quieter than the rookies. Still the one that comes back.

name: Spook Drone
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Emergency Reboot. First time destroyed, revive with 1 HP.
flavor_text: Never quite there. Never quite gone. The enemy pilot writes both sentences in the log.

name: Trap Drone
effect_text: Tracking Array. Apply Lock. Can block Skyward Maneuver units.
flavor_text: Small eyes on wide arcs. A quiet hand closing on the doorframe from outside.

name: Bomber Wing
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Critical Breach: deal 4 damage to the unit that destroyed this.
flavor_text: Rolls the bomb off the rack. Rolls itself onto the hull shortly after, without regret.

name: Guardian Drone
effect_text: Interceptor. Auto-Repair 1.
flavor_text: Older model, newer patience. Takes every hit and then calmly asks for the next.

name: Assault Wing
effect_text: Alpha Strike. Priority Fire. Attack triggers twice.
flavor_text: Paints the enemy's afternoon in two coats. The second arrives before the first dries.

name: Swarm Leader
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Battle Hardened. Grows with each hit taken.
flavor_text: Runs at the front. Takes the first hit for the swarm. The swarm gets bigger.

name: Jammer Drone
effect_text: Signal Jammer. Signal Jamming. Negates first spell; opponent cannot play Maneuvers next turn.
flavor_text: A nest of small antennas. Every message leaving the area comes back wrong.

name: Heavy Striker
effect_text: Priority Fire. Rapid Launch.
flavor_text: Heavier frame. Patient pilot. Deliberate ending for whatever lines up in the crosshairs.

name: Shadow Operative
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Cloaked Entry. Priority Fire.
flavor_text: Nobody invited it. Nobody stopped it. Nobody keeps the right records afterward.

name: Bomber Heavy
effect_text: Critical Breach: deal 5 damage when destroyed. Hot Deploy.
flavor_text: Launches loud. Detonates louder. Files its last postcard on the way down, calmly.

name: Interceptor Heavy
effect_text: Interceptor. Emergency Reboot. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: Always the first wall up. Usually the last wall down. Hardly ever in a hurry.

name: Carrier Drone
effect_text: Crew Pooling. Auto-Repair 1.
flavor_text: Carries pieces of everyone home. Carries the bills back, too, signed.

name: Scavenger Drone
effect_text: Fuel Scavenge. Hull Drain. Gain 1 energy when an enemy is destroyed.
flavor_text: Follows the fleet after the battle. Eats anything the fleet did not want to remember.

name: Recon Elite
effect_text: Deploy Burst: Probe 2 and Deep Scan.
flavor_text: Reads the battlefield. Reads it again. Writes a short sentence the pilot trusts.

name: Combat Spec
effect_text: Battle Hardened. Critical Strike.
flavor_text: Puts its time into its craft. The craft puts its time into the enemy quietly.

name: Siege Unit
effect_text: Cold Boot 1. Critical Strike.
flavor_text: Arrives, thinks, waits, then writes. The letters are large. The letters are final.

name: Elite Striker
effect_text: Alpha Strike. Priority Fire. Attacks twice first.
flavor_text: Hand-picked chassis. Hand-picked pilot. Hand-picked funeral, if the funeral is necessary.

name: Master Medic
effect_text: Auto-Repair 3. Hull Drain. Emergency Reboot.
flavor_text: Carries the ship back from every bad afternoon it could have had but did not.

name: Phantom Hunter
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Critical Strike. Tracking Lock.
flavor_text: Names the target. Paints the target. Arrives on a schedule no one else knows.

name: Heavy Bulwark Drone
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Walks at the front. Waits at the front. Falls at the front, usually, not often.

name: Capital Fighter
effect_text: Priority Fire. Hot Deploy.
flavor_text: Takes the room. Takes the hall. Takes the corridor the enemy thought was safe.

name: Ablative Mesh
effect_text: Reactive. Ablative Plating 1. Damage reduced by 1 before hitting HP.
flavor_text: Thin. Light. Patient. Gives up its material to keep the hull polite.

name: Overclocked Barrier
effect_text: Deploy Burst: Overclock. Enters with extra power for a turn.
flavor_text: Runs the shield coil hot for the first hour, then settles into quiet routine.

name: Decoy Hologram
effect_text: Cloaked Entry. Gain Stealth.
flavor_text: A little bright. A little loud. A little everywhere the real ship is not.

name: Reactive Grid
effect_text: System Shielding. Critical Breach: deal 3 damage when destroyed.
flavor_text: Eats the first shot. Writes a letter of complaint in the second. Dies nicely.

name: Ablative Lattice
effect_text: Ablative Plating 2. Auto-Repair 1.
flavor_text: Wears down. Knits up. Wears down again. Each shift smaller, each shift still enough.

name: Signal Baffles
effect_text: Signal Jammer. Gain Stealth.
flavor_text: Scatters the wavelength, scatters the sight, scatters the enemy's best comm ideas.

name: Adaptive Plating
effect_text: Adaptive Learning. Ablative Plating. Grows tougher per distinct card type played.
flavor_text: Hears the fight. Thickens quietly in the places the fight prefers to hit.

name: Hover Dome
effect_text: Interceptor. Evade 30%.
flavor_text: A polite umbrella in an impolite weather pattern. Mostly opens. Mostly stays up.

name: Reflex Barrier
effect_text: Reactive. Evade 40%.
flavor_text: The shield flicks sideways faster than the round it dodges. Usually. Not always.

name: Tracking Dome
effect_text: Tracking Array. Signal Jammer.
flavor_text: Watches the sky. Tells the sky to be quiet. The sky reluctantly obeys.

name: Fortress Mesh
effect_text: Interceptor. Ablative Plating 1.
flavor_text: Woven metal, woven habit. The hull sleeps better with a row of them standing guard.

name: Stealth Bulkhead
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Invisible enough to be ignored. Thick enough to be remembered, after.

name: Rebooting Plating
effect_text: Emergency Reboot. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: Dies, wakes up, dies, wakes up again. The pilot stopped counting on day two.

name: Reactive Mesh
effect_text: System Shielding. Critical Breach: deal 3 damage. Ablative Plating 1.
flavor_text: Three separate habits, bolted into one frame, still arguing amongst themselves politely.

name: Countered Barrier
effect_text: Countermeasure 2. Interceptor.
flavor_text: Costs the enemy a little extra for every polite question they send its way.

name: Regen Bulkhead
effect_text: Auto-Repair 2. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Heals while standing. Stands while healing. The pilot approves of the split shift.

name: Phase Grid
effect_text: Phase Drive. Evade 30%.
flavor_text: Half of it is somewhere else. The enemy aims at where it was. Misses. Again.

name: Sentinel Wall
effect_text: Interceptor. Battle Hardened. Gains power per damage taken.
flavor_text: Stands at the gap. Gains weight with every hit. Eventually leaves its own crater.

name: Aegis Mesh
effect_text: Ablative Plating 2. Interceptor.
flavor_text: A lighter version of the old fortress pattern. Still gets the job done, usually first.

name: Heavy Aegis
effect_text: Ablative Plating 3. Interceptor. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Three patterns stitched together. Every line of ancestry. Still holds the one promise.

name: Master Shield
effect_text: Auto-Repair 2. System Shielding.
flavor_text: The shield the other pilots recommend. The shield the engineers refuse to complain about.

name: Phantom Wall
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Cloaked Entry. Evade 30%.
flavor_text: Nobody can target it. Nobody can see it. Nobody writes home about it either.

name: Fortress Lattice
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Built from old panels. New welds, old pattern, the same patience as the original fortress.

name: Reboot Fortress
effect_text: Emergency Reboot. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Goes down. Comes back. Stays up. The pilot keeps notes out of sheer habit.

name: Counterfield
effect_text: Countermeasure 2. Negate. Cancels the first enemy ability targeting this.
flavor_text: A small taxing jurisdiction. Writes polite refusal letters to anything the enemy points at it.

name: Ablative Fortress
effect_text: Ablative Plating 3. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: Wears down steadily. Knits up steadily. A careful accounting in metal, signed off every dawn.

name: Master Bulwark
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Ablative Plating 2.
flavor_text: The kind of wall pilots argue is too expensive until the morning it saves them.

name: Phase Fortress
effect_text: Phase Drive. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Half the wall is here. The other half argues with the next universe over.

name: Titanic Aegis
effect_text: Ablative Plating 4. Emergency Reboot.
flavor_text: Four layers of slow refusal. When the last one gives, the whole panel politely restarts.

name: Grand Fortress
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: The grand name is not bragging. It is the fleet's polite enemy warning.
